title: Assurance Pack Envelope (v0.1)
description: Top-level Pack object. Carries the @context URL, semver, identifier, issuance timestamp, ordered events array, optional extended/extensions content, and Pack-level signature. The Pack signature signs the JCS canonicalisation of this object with the top-level 'signature' field removed.

@context.description: JSON-LD context URL. For v0.1 Packs, MUST be exactly this string. Array form is not permitted in v0.1; relaxation is additive future work.

specVersion.description: Plain semver string. For Packs validating against this v0.1 envelope, MUST match '0.1.<patch>'. The MAJOR.MINOR encoded here MUST match the MAJOR.MINOR in the @context URL.

packId.description: Unique identifier for this Pack. SHOULD be a URI (e.g. 'urn:uuid:...' or an HTTPS URL). Globally unique: two artifacts sharing the same packId MUST be byte-identical.

issuedAt.description: RFC 3339 / ISO 8601 timestamp at which the Pack was issued. Distinct from any event's occurredAt.

events.description: Ordered, non-empty array of events. Each item MUST validate against the event envelope; structural conformance also requires each event's payload to validate against its per-type schema under event/. See docs/spec/v0.1/events.md.

extended.description: Optional audience-neutral evidence shapes. All properties are optional but closed: only the properties listed below are permitted in v0.1. Audience-specific or implementer-specific content belongs under 'extensions'. See ADR 0005.

extensions.description: Implementer-defined slots. Keys are implementer namespaces (e.g. 'striadex', 'acme.audit'). The spec defines only the slot; the value shape is the implementer's responsibility and is documented externally. See ADR 0005 and docs/spec/v0.1/extensions.md.
